title: senecio australis
intro: Senecio australis, also known as Poverty Weed, is a perennial plant native to Australia, characterized by its small yellow flowers and narrow leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Senecio australis include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and acting as a natural diuretic. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infused oil, and can also be used in tinctures, capsules, or topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
